parameters.content:
## HSL Fee Collections — Fees Closed Sync

**Webhook URL** — After activating, copy the production webhook URL and set it as `FEES_CLOSED_SYNC_WEBHOOK_URL` in your Next.js `.env.local`.

**Expected sheet tab name:** `Fees Closed` (case-insensitive match)

**How it works:**
- Next.js POSTs `{ trigger: "manual" }` to this webhook
- Reads all rows from the Fees Closed tab
- Returns a JSON array of row objects keyed by column name
- Used by the sync route to cross-reference DB-only cases
